name: Sichuan Meifeng Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Meifeng Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical fertilizers in China. It offers urea, compound fertilizer, melamine, diesel exhaust gas treatment, nitric acid, and ammonium nitrate; and plastic-woven products and heavy-duty film packaging bags, as well as woven products. The company is based in Deyang, China.
